changes.description: Converted global dict and functions into Student and GradeBook classes
changes.rationale: Encapsulates student data with its behavior, eliminating global mutable state
Replaces anonymous dicts with a typed structure

changes.description: Used properties for computed values (average, letter_grade, attendance_rate)
changes.rationale: Natural Python idiom for derived attributes

changes.description: Extracted grade thresholds into a class constant
changes.rationale: Makes the grading scale configurable and removes if/elif chain
